title: apteria lilacina
intro: Apteria lilacina is a species of flowering plant in the family Selaginellaceae, commonly known as spikemoss. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. Apteria lilacina is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. It can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and its leaves can be used to make a poultice or applied topically to affected areas.
